subject: [PATCH 1/5] mm: memcg: factor out trylock_stock() and unlock_stock()

reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: The patch looks good to them and they're glad it's being factored out. They mention that they almost missed a detail, but it sounds fine to them.

reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: They ask Andrew to fold the patch into his work.

2026-03-05.patch_summary: Factor out trylock_stock() and unlock_stock() into inline functions to improve code readability.
